specs.label: Primary text guidance

creativePrompts: Design for mobile-first viewing with the key message visible immediately.
Keep any text overlay minimal and legible at small screen sizes.
Provide safe-area-aware variants if the asset may be extended into Stories/Reels.

specs.label: Safe areas
specs.value: Keep important elements away from top/bottom UI zones.

specs.label: File type
specs.value: JPG or PNG

copyFields.label: Story frame copy
copyFields.placeholder: XXX — write on-asset story copy here.

creativePrompts: Use large, high-contrast type and clear visual hierarchy.
Keep logo/CTA away from native app controls.
If multiple frames are needed, indicate frame order and copy per frame.

specs.label: Creative note
specs.value: Build native-feeling vertical video with immediate motion/hook.

specs.label: Audio
specs.value: Design with sound-on, but ensure the message works with captions/supers.

specs.label: Safe areas
specs.value: Avoid placing key text under TikTok UI controls.

copyFields.label: Caption
copyFields.limit: Confirm current TikTok Ads Manager limit

creativePrompts: Start with the product, problem, creator, or benefit immediately.
Use native platform pacing, captions, and creator-style framing where appropriate.
Include music/SFX direction and any legal/audio constraints.

specs.label: Creative note
specs.value: Vertical imagery generally performs best in the feed.

specs.label: File type
specs.value: JPG or PNG

creativePrompts: Make the product or outcome easy to understand without relying on sound/motion.
Use tasteful branding and text overlay that supports search/discovery intent.
Consider seasonal/contextual visual cues based on the plan timing.

specs.label: Copy
specs.value: Short copy is easier to scan in-feed; verify current paid post limit.

specs.label: Creative note
specs.value: The image should make sense alongside post text and link card context.

specs.label: File type
specs.value: JPG or PNG

creativePrompts: Lead with a sharp POV, offer, launch message, or timely reason to care.
Keep image text limited and legible in a fast-scrolling feed.
Confirm whether comments, replies, or quote-post behavior requires moderation planning.
exampleSearches: X promoted post image ad examples

specs.label: Format
specs.value: Video ad that can run before/during/after YouTube videos.

specs.label: Opening guidance
specs.value: Brand and hook early before users can skip.

specs.label: Companion elements
specs.value: Confirm headline, CTA, URL, and companion/banner requirements in Google Ads.

specs.label: Creative note
specs.value: Plan for sound-on and captioned viewing.

creativePrompts: Make the brand, offer, or story clear before the skip point.
Include supers/captions for key claims and legal lines as needed.
Specify cutdowns if the media plan includes :06/:15/:30 versions.
